//NodeRegistry: TimeoutSeconds — how long a node can miss heartbeats before it's evicted. ReaperIntervalSeconds — how often the reaper sweeps.
//Dispatcher: TimeoutSeconds — max wall-clock time a single inference job may take before the coordinator gives up on it.
//Router: AffinitySlidingMinutes — sticky-conversation idle expiry. AffinityLoadBreakThreshold — how many extra in-flight jobs the sticky node may have before we break affinity.

Auth.//ApiKeys: Set real values via env (Auth__ApiKeys__0=...) or user-secrets. Empty list = no remote access.
Auth.//AdminApiKeys: Bearer tokens that unlock /api/admin (cordon, uncordon, deregister). Separate from ApiKeys. Empty list = no remote admin access (loopback still honours RequireAuthForLoopback).
Auth.//RequireAuthForLoopback: If true, even loopback requests must present a Bearer token. Applies to both ApiKeys and AdminApiKeys.
Auth.//NodeEnrollmentSecret: Set via env (Auth__NodeEnrollmentSecret) or user-secrets. Empty = nodes cannot connect.

//VectorStore: Optional persistent vector store. Disabled by default. Provider selects the backend: 'local' (file-backed, replicated to the GPU fleet, self-healing) or 'postgres' (external PostgreSQL + pgvector — HNSW search, transactions, backups; no node replication). Distance/DefaultEmbeddingModel/Retrieval apply to both.

//VectorStore.example.//Postgres: Used only when Provider=postgres. ConnectionString is REQUIRED — set it via env (VectorStore__Postgres__ConnectionString) or user-secrets, never here. Schema/TablePrefix become SQL identifiers (^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]*$). Index: hnsw | ivfflat | none. Note: pgvector's ANN index tops out at 2000 dimensions.
